message:
fix(content): update GitHub star counts to match actual repository values

Update star counts across flywheelTools and tldrFlywheelTools arrays
to reflect current GitHub API values (as of 2026-01-14):

Core tools updated:
- MCP Agent Mail: 1400 → 1433
- Beads Viewer: 891 → 927
- CASS: 307 → 312
- ACFS (Flywheel Setup): 234 → 692 (significant increase!)
- NTM: 69 → 71

Tools with corrected lower values:
- DCG (Destructive Command Guard): 89 → 22
- Repo Updater: 67 → 29
- XF (X Archive Search): 156 → 25
- Source to Prompt TUI: 78 → 8

Also fixes SLB repository URL from 'simultaneous_launch_button' to 'slb'
to match the actual GitHub repository name.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

     description:
       "Adds safety friction for autonomous agents. Three-tier risk classification (CRITICAL/DANGEROUS/CAUTION), cryptographic command binding with SHA256+HMAC, dynamic quorum based on active agents, and complete audit trails. Integrates with Claude Code hooks and MCP Agent Mail for notifications.",
